Milestone: AI usage policy agreed and shared
Done when: Everyone who uses AI tools has read it

Milestone: Approved tools list written (tool, plan, purpose)
Done when: List exists and is where people can find it
Hours/week on target tasks written down honestly
Test run passes with dummy data
Running on real work; outputs checked daily

Milestone: Review vs baseline; keep, fix or kill
Personal AI habits session for the team
Done when: Everyone has 2-3 prompts saved for their role
A place to report wins failures and ideas
Someone knows what to do when AI output is wrong
Hours saved and quality effects honestly stated
All AI subscriptions listed vs value delivered
Anything not earning its keep is cancelled

Milestone: Data: nothing on the never-paste list reaches AI tools
Quality: every automated output has a review step
Dependency: workflows can run manually within a day
Customers: human one step away wherever AI talks to customers
Staff: concerns asked about not assumed
Spend: AI subscription total known and reviewed
